mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_hourly_stats ( employee_id, stat_hour, total_tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_cost, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, conversation_turns, complete_turns, error_turns, skill_invocations, skill_errors, tool_calls, tool_errors, error_count ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{statHour}, #{totalTokens}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{totalCost}, #{cacheReadTokens}, #{cacheWriteTokens}, #{conversationTurns}, #{completeTurns}, #{errorTurns}, #{skillInvocations}, #{skillErrors}, #{toolCalls}, #{toolErrors}, #{errorCount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_tokens = VALUES(total_tokens), input_tokens = VALUES(input_tokens), output_tokens = VALUES(output_tokens), total_cost = VALUES(total_cost), cache_read_tokens = VALUES(cache_read_tokens), cache_write_tokens = VALUES(cache_write_tokens), conversation_turns = VALUES(conversation_turns), complete_turns = VALUES(complete_turns), error_turns = VALUES(error_turns), skill_invocations = VALUES(skill_invocations), skill_errors = VALUES(skill_errors), tool_calls = VALUES(tool_calls), tool_errors = VALUES(tool_errors), error_count = VALUES(error_count)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dashboard_hourly_stats WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND stat_hour >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{startTime} / 1000) AND stat_hour <= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{endTime} / 1000) ORDER BY stat_hour
